data.chapter_title_en: supplications for when you wake up
data.arabic_text: ( الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي عَافَانِي فِي جَسَدِي، وَرَدَّ عَلَيَّ رُوحِي، وَأَذِنَ لي بِذِكْرِهِ )
data.english_text: (All praise is for Allah who restored to me my health and returned my soul and  has allowed me to remember Him.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Alhamdu lillahil-lathee AAafanee fee jasadee waradda AAalayya roohee wa-athina lee bithikrih.)
